questions.text: In interference pattern energy is?
questions.subject: Physics
questions.topic: Optics, Nature of Light and Optical Instruments

options.text: Destroyed at the position of minimum

options.explanation: Ar = A1 + A2 (Constructive)Ar = A1 - A2 (Destructive)As the intensity is directly propotional to square of amplitudeI = k.A2 (k=1)I = A2Imax = (A1 + A2)2Imin = (A1 - A2)2A = A1 = A2 Imax = (A + A)2 =>Imax = (2A)2 =>Imax = 4A2Imin = (A - A)2 =>Imin = (0)ITotal = Imax + IminITotal = 4A2 + 0Itotal= 4A²Mathematically the total energy before and after interference remains the same just redistribute

questions.explanation: Ar = A1 + A2 (Constructive)Ar = A1 - A2 (Destructive)As the intensity is directly propotional to square of amplitudeI = k.A2 (k=1)I = A2Imax = (A1 + A2)2Imin = (A1 - A2)2A = A1 = A2 Imax = (A + A)2 =>Imax = (2A)2 =>Imax = 4A2Imin = (A - A)2 =>Imin = (0)ITotal = Imax + IminITotal = 4A2 + 0Itotal= 4A²Mathematically the total energy before and after interference remains the same just redistribute

questions.text: When uranium-238 emits an alpha particle, it becomes thorium-234,which emits a beta particle to become protactinium. What is the atomic number of protactinium?

questions.topic: Nuclear Physics

options.explanation: An α-particle decreases the atomic number bt 2 and mass number by 4. And β-particle emission increases the atomic number by 1.

questions.text: A radioactive isotope has a half life of 2 minutes. What can be declared from this statement?
questions.subject: Physics
questions.topic: Nuclear Physics

options.text: After 1/2 minutes, 1/4 of the isotope remain
After 1 minute, 1/4 of the isotope remain
After 4 minute, 1/4 of the isotope remain
options.explanation: As the Half life is 2 min and the original qunatity of isotopes is 1/2 when we double the time then multiply the half of the new time time we get remaining isotopesIn this question1st half life = 1/2 of the original isotopes2nd half life (4 minutes) = 1/2 x 1/2 of the origial isotopes

options.text: After 4 minute, none of the isotope remain

questions.explanation: As the Half life is 2 min and the original qunatity of isotopes is 1/2 when we double the time then multiply the half of the new time time we get remaining isotopesIn this question1st half life = 1/2 of the original isotopes2nd half life (4 minutes) = 1/2 x 1/2 of the origial isotopes

questions.text: Velocity of sound is greater in solids than gases because:
questions.subject: Physics
questions.topic: Optics, Nature of Light and Optical Instruments

options.text: Density of solids is high and elasticity is low
Both density and elasticity are low
Density is low and elasticity is high
Elasticity of solids is very high
options.explanation: The velocity of sound is greater than in gases primarily because solids have much higher elasticity. The high elasticity allows sound waves to move more quickly despite also solids having higher density. (Concept of atomic packing).

questions.explanation: Here is the explanation of the correct optionThe velocity of sound is greater than in gases primarily because solids have much higher elasticity. The high elasticity allows sound waves to move more quickly despite also solids having higher density. (Concept of atomic packing).

questions.text: W.O.F does not effect the motion of moving electron?
questions.subject: Physics
questions.topic: Optics, Nature of Light and Optical Instruments

options.text: Electric Field applied in direction of motion
Electric Field applied perpendicular to direction of motion
Magnetic Field applied in direction of motion
options.explanation: F = q(v x b)As v & b are in same direction so their cross product is zero F = q (0)F = 0(The perpendicular option will cause the electron to move in the circular motion)(For Electric field use F = qE (the parallel one cause the electron to experience a force in the direction of the field and changing its speed while perpendicular one will only cause the change in direction) )

options.text: Magnetic Field applied perpendicular to direction of motion

questions.explanation: Here is the explanation of the correct optionF = q(v x b)As v & b are in same direction so their cross product is zero F = q (0)F = 0(The perpendicular option will cause the electron to move in the circular motion)(For Electric field use F = qE (the parallel one cause the electron to experience a force in the direction of the field and changing its speed while perpendicular one will only cause the change in direction) )

questions.text: An artificial satellite of earth releases a packet. If air resistance is neglected, the point where the packet will hit will be?
questions.subject: Physics
questions.topic: Optics, Nature of Light and Optical Instruments

options.explanation: Fc = mv2/rThe satellite will move in a circular orbit. When the packet is released it retains the tangential velocity of satellite.The packet will know act as a free falling body it will continue to follow a trajectory determined by initial tangential velocity and gravitational acceleration.The packet retains the horizontal velocity of the satellite upon the release and because no horizontal forces act on it will continue to move horizontally at the same speed as satellite.So it will revolve the earth like the satellite

questions.explanation: Here is the explanation of the correct optionFc = mv2/rThe satellite will move in a circular orbit. When the packet is released it retains the tangential velocity of satellite.The packet will know act as a free falling body it will continue to follow a trajectory determined by initial tangential velocity and gravitational acceleration.The packet retains the horizontal velocity of the satellite upon the release and because no horizontal forces act on it will continue to move horizontally at the same speed as satellite.So it will revolve the earth like the satellite
